title: Trump Administration to Announce Deal That Could Let Saudis Enrich Nuclear Fuel
summary: U.S. lawmakers and Israeli officials have expressed opposition to such a plan, to be announced Wednesday, fearing that the kingdom could use a civilian nuclear project to develop nuclear weapons.

title: Expected U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Fuels Israeli Concerns of Regional Arms Race
summary: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the deal, but critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.

title: Trump Reaches Contentious New Nuclear Deal, and A.I. Models Go Rogue
summary: Plus, what is a Jimothy?

title: See How Houthis Put the Red Sea at Risk as an Alternative Oil Route
summary: Saudi Arabia has diverted huge amounts of oil to the Red Sea since the Iran war began, but now the Iranian-backed Houthi militants say that they intend to block that route.

title: With His Latest Threats, Trump Signals to Iran That He Is Willing to Escalate
summary: President Trump is facing a critical moment in the war, which has failed to bring about the “unconditional surrender” he once demanded.

title: Mamdani Calls Netanyahu a ‘War Criminal’ and Calls on U.S. to Arrest Him
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani challenged the United States to execute an international arrest warrant against Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel, which New York itself cannot do.

title: Ukraine’s New Military Chief Faces a Monumental Test
summary: Maj. Gen. Mykhailo Drapatyi faces a balancing act between asserting the independence favored by military reformers and accommodating political input on battlefield strategy.

title: Firing of Ukraine’s Top General Signals the End of an Era
summary: Gen. Oleksandr Syrskyi, who commanded crucial battles, oversaw an expansion of drone warfare against Russia, but many Ukrainians want even more.

title: Laredo’s Future Rides on Trump’s Next Trade Move
summary: The economy of Laredo, Texas, has boomed under the president’s global tariffs. Now, his demands may threaten its success.

title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.

title: He’s the Last Great Land Artist You’ve Never Heard Of
summary: Charles Ross spent 50 years building “Star Axis,” a naked-eye observatory in New Mexico. Now his masterwork is ready. How to share it with a changed world?

title: A Lettuce-Growing Region in Mexico Stomachs the Fallout From the Cyclospora Outbreak
summary: In central Mexico, a lettuce-growing region has been potentially linked to an outbreak in the U.S. that has sickened thousands.

title: Cyclospora Cases in the U.S. Hit Record High
summary: Federal health officials have confirmed another 2,500 cases of the parasitic infection.

title: 6 Takeaways From Arizona’s Tense, Trump-Dominated Primaries
summary: Republicans nominated a former N.F.L. kicker in a top House battleground, a Trump loyalist for governor and an election denier for the state’s top election post.

title: How Donald Trump Jr.’s 1789 Capital Is Cashing In Without Apology
summary: The fledgling firm, run by the president’s oldest son and his partner Omeed Malik, has made investments in A.I. and defense technology that have tripled in value in just months.

title: At a Utah Campus, an Emotional Odyssey After Charlie Kirk’s Death
summary: Since Mr. Kirk was gunned down at Utah Valley University, the school and its students have struggled to find a way forward.

title: Japan Is Startled by Prime Minister’s Grueling Sleep Schedule
summary: Sanae Takaichi has said she gets just “zero to three hours” of sleep a night, prompting a debate in the country over work-life balance.

title: Joe McCarthy Lives!
summary: Trump’s attempt to drum up a third red scare is certain to fail.

title: Dirty Lettuce
summary: We look into the cyclospora outbreak.

title: ‘The Daily Show’ Tackles Trump’s Latest Move in His ‘War on Canada’
summary: “Fighting again with Canada?” Desi Lydic said about the president imposing new tariffs on the country. “I thought we were going to work this ‘oot.’”

title: After Decades of Caution, Germany Is Shaking Up How It Makes Weapons
summary: As threats from Moscow rise and support from Washington dwindles, the German military is reinventing how it researches, funds and wields 21st-century arms.
